message:
fix(ratelimit,store): harden arithmetic overflow in rate limiters, coverage stats, and repair

Four overflow/edge-case fixes across rate-limiting and storage crates:

Rate limiters (sliding_window.rs, token_bucket.rs):
- Replace unchecked Duration addition (total_waited + wait_time) with
  checked_add().unwrap_or(Duration::MAX) in acquire_with_max_wait()
  loops to prevent panic on extreme wait times
- Add zero-limit/zero-capacity guard in wait_time() returning
  Duration::MAX instead of dividing by zero

Store coverage (offline.rs):
- Prevent silent numeric truncation in coverage_bps() when
  overcoverage is extreme: clamp to u32::MAX instead of silently
  wrapping via `as u32` cast

Store repair (repair.rs):
- Fix u128-to-u64 conversion in RateLimiter::refill(): use
  u64::try_from(elapsed.as_nanos()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX) instead of
  bare `as u64` cast that could silently truncate after ~584 years
  of elapsed time (defensive, but correct)
- Fix test node ID collision: change `else { 2 }` to `else { 3 }`
  in repair fuzz test to avoid creating symbols with overlapping
  node IDs that would be silently deduplicated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
